title: 45. WPS Dicts: Enriched Configs (Batch 1)
original_text: Listo. Enriquecí los 20 `dict.conf` nuevos de `build/wps-libreoffice-dicts` para que tengan el mismo estilo de los originales de WPS: [Dictionary] DisplayName=... DisplayName[zh_CN]=... etc. También actualicé [tools/wps_libreoffice_dict_converter.py] para que, en futuras conversiones, genere esos `dict.conf` enriquecidos automáticamente. Verifiqué: 20 dict.conf nuevos actualizados, 8 DisplayName por archivo...
expected_subject: feat(dict): enrich dict.conf with localized display names
expected_body_lines: - Add DisplayName entries for zh_CN, en_US, es_ES, and other locales
- Update converter tool to auto-generate enriched configs
- Apply changes to 20 new regional variant folders
- Verify compilation and mapping integrity (71 mappings, 0 errors)
expected_command:
git commit -m "feat(dict): enrich dict.conf with localized display names" \
  -m "- Add DisplayName entries for zh_CN, en_US, es_ES, and other locales" \
  -m "- Update converter tool to auto-generate enriched configs" \
  -m "- Apply changes to 20 new regional variant folders" \
  -m "- Verify compilation and mapping integrity (71 mappings, 0 errors)"
